name: Simple Todo API
description: A minimal web application for managing todo items — a user accesses a web frontend, the frontend calls an API service, the API stores todos in a database.

nodes.name: User
nodes.description: Person creating and viewing todo items

nodes.name: Todo Web App
nodes.description: Browser-based interface for managing todo items

nodes.name: Todo API
nodes.description: REST API handling todo item CRUD operations

relationships.description: User accesses the todo web application
Web app calls the API to read and write todos
API stores and retrieves todo items from the database
